title: Edward Hamb
compiled_truth: Edward Hamb is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-15 to 2001-11-30), Edward Hamb sent 2 and received 71 emails, totalling 73 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (2), [Suan Dinh](people/suan-dinh) (1).
